offer: For restaurant owners processing 10–20 payrolls/month, manual timesheet entry causes payroll delays. We automate payroll instead of manual payroll processing.
problem: Manual timesheet entry leads to payroll delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant owners
